pageDescription: Discover your body type based on measurements with our comprehensive body type calculator

hourglass.title: Hourglass
hourglass.description: Balanced bust and hip measurements with a well-defined waist

pear.title: Pear
pear.description: Wider hips and thighs with a narrower bust and shoulders

apple.title: Apple
apple.description: Wider waist and upper body with narrower hips

rectangle.title: Rectangle
rectangle.description: Similar measurements for bust, waist, and hips

invertedTriangle.title: Inverted Triangle
invertedTriangle.description: Broader shoulders and bust with narrower hips

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides estimates only and is not a diagnostic tool
criticalWarningsList.generalGuidelines: Body types are general guidelines and may not apply to everyone

importantNotesList: Body type can influence fitness and styling choices
Focus on overall health rather than achieving a specific body type
Consult healthcare professionals for personalized advice
Body type may change with age, fitness level, and other factors

messages.enterMeasurements: Enter your measurements to determine your body type
messages.measurementInstructions: Take measurements at the fullest part of each area

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides estimates based on mathematical formulas and should not be used as a substitute for professional advice. Individual results may vary based on factors not accounted for in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Consult a Healthcare Professional
seekHelp.content: For personalized health and fitness advice, please consult with a healthcare professional or certified fitness trainer who can provide guidance based on your complete health history and individual circumstances.

errors.heightCm: Please enter valid height in cm
errors.bustChest: Please enter a valid bust/chest measurement
errors.waist: Please enter a valid waist measurement
errors.hip: Please enter a valid hip measurement
errors.shoulder: Please enter a valid shoulder width

tooltips.bustChest: Measure at the fullest part of your bust or chest
tooltips.waist: Measure at the narrowest part of your torso
tooltips.hip: Measure at the fullest part of your hips
tooltips.shoulder: Measure across the back from shoulder to shoulder (men only)

enter_your_measurements_to_determine_bod: Enter your measurements to determine body shape and waist-hip ratio
measured_about_7_inches_18_cm_below_wais: Measured about 7 inches / 18 cm below waist
measured_at_the_widest_part_of_hips_10: Measured at the widest part of hips
enter_all_measurements_and_click_calcula: Enter all measurements and click "Calculate Type" to see your analysis.
this_tool_is_for_informational_purposes_:
This tool is for informational purposes only and not a substitute for medical advice. Body
                            shape classifications are general guidelines and individual variations are normal.
balanced_bust_and_hips_with_defined_wais: Balanced bust and hips with defined waist
slightly_larger_hips_with_defined_waist_: Slightly larger hips with defined waist
slightly_larger_bust_with_defined_waist_: Slightly larger bust with defined waist
fuller_hips_and_thighs_smaller_bust_41: Fuller hips and thighs, smaller bust
similar_bust_waist_and_hip_measurements_: Similar bust, waist, and hip measurements
higher_whr_indicates_more_abdominal_fat_:
Higher WHR indicates more abdominal fat, associated with increased risk of cardiovascular
                              disease and diabetes.
apple_shapes_higher_whr_may_have_higher_:
Apple shapes (higher WHR) may have higher health risks than pear shapes, but individual
                              factors vary greatly.
